records.m_Talk_ENG: That little girl is a Grade S Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, indeed. The data was collected by the Lotus City Management, ensuring its absolute credibility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This unidentified meteorite incident was resolved quickly and efficiently. I believe it's thanks to your excellent use of that Grade S talent, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This unidentified meteorite incident was resolved quickly and efficiently. I believe it's thanks to your excellent use of that Grade S talent, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This unidentified meteorite incident was resolved quickly and efficiently. I believe it's thanks to your excellent use of that Grade S talent, Seo Yoon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, should I make full use of the Grade S before she leaves for a better company?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, should I make full use of the Grade S before she leaves for a better company?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, should I make full use of the Grade S before she leaves for a better company?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm confident you will take good care of our new recruit and make sure she doesn't get distracted by other companies, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm confident you will take good care of our new recruit and make sure she doesn't get distracted by other companies, Seo Yoon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, I have another schedule, so I'll be going.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Well then, I have another schedule, so I'll be going.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Seo Yoon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Seo Yoon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you still angry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you still angry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you still angry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're asking if I'm angry at you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're asking if I'm angry at you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're asking if I'm angry at you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, not at all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, not at all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, not at all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Umm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Umm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Umm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I don't dislike you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I don't dislike you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I don't dislike you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A naive Grade S Counter who listens to everything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A naive Grade S Counter who listens to everything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A naive Grade S Counter who listens to everything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Should I tame her and make her mine?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Should I tame her and make her mine?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Should I tame her and make her mine?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... what about the house? It was Seo Yoon's one and only home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... what about the house? It was Seo Yoon's one and only home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... what about the house? It was Seo Yoon's one and only home.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We can just find a new house.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Find a... new house? Doesn't it need to be rebuilt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Find a... new house? Doesn't it need to be rebuilt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, now you're getting it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, now you're getting it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we can't rent new clothes, so how about we go shopping today since the house is destroyed.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But we can't rent new clothes, so how about we go shopping today since the house is destroyed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...! This house is huge.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...! This house is huge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can smell a strong flower scent too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the scent of cosmetics.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we have the chance, I'll teach you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! That sounds fun!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So cute!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So cute!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So cute!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are these fluffy things?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are these fluffy things?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are these fluffy things?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, they're characters from a kids' cartoon that's popular these days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, they're characters from a kids' cartoon that's popular these days.

records.m_Talk_FRA: They're just dolls, so why are they so expensive?

records.m_Talk_FRA: There are so many different kinds. Just the ones on that shelf could cover our squad's food expenses for a whole year.

root.m_Talk_DEU: So, should I make full use of the Grade S before she leaves for a better company?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, should I make full use of the Grade S before she leaves for a better company?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm confident you will take good care of our new recruit and make sure she doesn't get distracted by other companies, Seo Yoon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm confident you will take good care of our new recruit and make sure she doesn't get distracted by other companies, Seo Yoon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm confident you will take good care of our new recruit and make sure she doesn't get distracted by other companies, Seo Yoon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well then, I have another schedule, so I'll be going.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Seo Yoon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you still angry?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you still angry?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you still angry?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're asking if I'm angry at you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're asking if I'm angry at you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're asking if I'm angry at you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, not at all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, not at all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, not at all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What I said earlier wasn't meant to be polite. Sometimes a sharp comment works better than a soft warning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... It definitely felt sharp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What about you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What about you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What about you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I make you dislike me by getting angry?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Umm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Umm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Umm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I don't dislike you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I don't dislike you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I don't dislike you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were angry not because you hated me, but because you were concerned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I'm lucky to have such a considerate colleague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Usually, even Grade B Counters are full of themselves. But she doesn't seem to think she's better than others.

root.m_Talk_DEU: A naive Grade S Counter who listens to everything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A naive Grade S Counter who listens to everything...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Should I tame her and make her mine?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Should I tame her and make her mine?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Should I tame her and make her mine?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... what about the house? It was Seo Yoon's one and only home.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But... what about the house? It was Seo Yoon's one and only home.

root.m_Talk_FRA: We can just find a new house.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Find a... new house? Doesn't it need to be rebuilt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Find a... new house? Doesn't it need to be rebuilt?
